company.what_they_do: punkproof.com is a free/public email service provider — it offers email addresses to the general public, similar to Gmail or Outlook. It is NOT a company called 'Bobsec' or any kind of security firm. The homepage explicitly describes itself as a public email service focused on spam prevention and safe/secure email delivery. It asks receiving services not to block its domain, clarifying it is not a throwaway/disposable email provider.
company.raw_notes: The domain punkproof.com hosts a public email platform, not a business called 'Bobsec'. The org_name 'Bobsec' was self-reported by the user at signup and does not correspond to any verifiable company associated with this domain. The homepage language ('we do not allow sending messages to the internet', 'not a throwaway email service', 'abuse reporting via abuse ticket system') strongly suggests this is a free public inbox service — the kind commonly used by individuals who do not wish to share a personal or corporate email address. There is no product, service, or business identity associated with punkproof.com that matches 'Bobsec'.
